subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from this Youth unto him who hath been guided by the lights of God and is numbered among the triumphant in the Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من هذا الغلام الی الذی اهتدی بانوار الله و کان من الفائزین فی اللوح
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge; recognition of God
